heroSection.welcome:
Welcome to iBank, Hanover Insurance's 
 content management application.

dashboard.adminHelp: Full organisational overview: employee demographics, recent activity, content counts by role.
dashboard.underWriterHelp: Track activity and access your content from the dashboard.
dashboard.businessAnalystHelp: Track your content and platform activity.
dashboard.actuarialAnalystHelp: Monitor content counts and recent platform activity.
dashboard.businessOpRatingHelp: View your content and platform activity.
dashboard.widgetsInfo: Drag any card to reorder within its row
dashboard.employeeEditsinfo: Fluctuation in content edits by role over time.

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.info: The Recent Activity feed shows information about the four most recent actions taken across the application. This includes the user, the time, the date, and what they did. Go to the Activity page using the side bar for a longer time line of activity!

employeeDemographics.title: Employee Demographics
employeeDemographics.info: Breakdown of employees by role. Hover a slice for exact numbers.
